hypothesis: Pure trendline_rejection entries (no ribbon_flip) are losers (IS n=58, WR=27.6%, avg=-$34). Ribbon_flip+trendline (n=6, WR=50%, avg=+$312) should be kept. Gate: block TRENDLINE entries without ribbon_flip.
hold_reason: OOS NEGATIVE: delta=-$190 from 14 blocked OOS entries (avg=-$13.57/entry). OOS trendline entries had positive EV in May 2026 VIX spike recovery regime. WF=-1.371 FAIL.
key_insight: IS trendline drag is regime-specific. VIX 15-17 trendline entries are actually profitable (+$1,338 IS). VIX 21-25 trendline entries are the worst (-$879). In OOS May 2026 (post-tariff VIX spike), blocked trendline entries would have been profitable on average. This is a C5/VIX-character pattern: low-VIX trendline IS good, mid-high VIX trendline context-dependent.
alternative_research: Consider VIX-bucketed trendline gate (block at VIX 21-25 only) vs blanket ribbon_flip requirement. Also consider that ribbon_flip+trendline (n=13 with cascade after fix) WR=38.5% shows the gate IS directionally right in IS.
